nodes.name: measuring-text.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference explaining how to measure text dimensions, fit text to a target width, and detect text overflow in Remotion compositions. External documentation bundled with the remotion-best-practices skill, not versus-engine's own source.

nodes.name: parameters.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference on exposing Studio-editable parameters (including a color picker control) for React Markup compositions. External reference doc, not part of versus-engine's own code.

nodes.name: sequencing.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference covering premounting, the Series component (including overlaps), frame references inside sequences, and nesting sequences/compositions. External documentation bundled with the plugin.

nodes.name: sfx.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference with concise guidance on adding sound-effect cues to a Remotion composition. External reference doc bundled with the remotion-best-practices skill.

nodes.name: silence-detection.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference describing an adaptive silence-detection workflow using ffmpeg's loudnorm filter, interpreting silence output, and trimming leading/trailing silence for a Remotion <Video> component.

nodes.name: text-highlights.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference covering how to implement animated text highlight effects in React Markup. External documentation bundled with the plugin, not versus-engine's own source.

nodes.name: timing.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference on Studio-editable animation patterns, Bezier/cubic easing curves with copy-paste examples, enter/exit easing direction, and composing multiple interpolations.

nodes.name: transitions.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference on @remotion/transitions' TransitionSeries: transition and overlay examples, mixing the two, available transition types (including slide direction), timing options, and duration calculation for the total composition.

nodes.name: trimming.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference explaining how to trim the beginning, end, or beginning-with-delay of a clip in a Remotion composition. External documentation bundled with the plugin.

nodes.name: video-editing.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference on independently positioning clips and performing ripple editing with TransitionSeries. External reference doc, not versus-engine's own source.

nodes.name: voiceover.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference on adding AI-generated voiceover to a composition: generating audio with ElevenLabs, computing dynamic composition duration via calculateMetadata, rendering the audio component, and delaying audio start.
